nodes.label: AI as communication polish tool
nodes.grounding_span: I'd ask the AI to rewrite it. Make it more polished but also fun.

nodes.label: AI as content creation tool for education
nodes.label_negative: AI as inaccurate or condescending content generator
nodes.grounding_span: I'll like ask the AI to come up with say a pop quiz about cell structures tailored to 9th grade biology level.

nodes.label: AI accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: My concerns then are more about it being accurate!

nodes.label: Human authenticity in client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I worry they might think I don't care or that I'm dumb.

nodes.label: AI as skill maintenance risk
nodes.grounding_span: I do sometimes worry that my writing ability may get worse bc I often use AI to fix it.

nodes.label: AI as tailored educational assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as generic or condescending tutor
nodes.grounding_span: I wanted the AI to rewrite an article about some mummies found in like South America for their grade level.

nodes.label: Authentic client relationships
nodes.grounding_span: I want them to feel that I will love them like they do

nodes.label: Educational accuracy and integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I double check to make sure that its answers are correct.

nodes.label: Personal skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I do sometimes worry that my writing ability may get worse

nodes.label: Positive satisfaction with AI for communication polish
nodes.grounding_span: I'd ask the AI to rewrite it. Make it more polished but also fun.

nodes.label: Concern about appearing impersonal to clients
nodes.grounding_span: I worry they might think I don't care or that I'm dumb.

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's condescending tone
nodes.grounding_span: It was either too cutesy or focused on wrong aspects of articles

nodes.label: Concern about skill atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: I do sometimes worry that my writing ability may get worse

nodes.label: Aspirational desire for integrated AI assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I'd love for an AI assistant on my phone to perfectly draft texts for clients.

nodes.label: Domain-specific interaction style shifting
nodes.grounding_span: I feel way more casual with pet care. ... With tutoring, I often find myself already writing more professionally

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with explicit constraints
nodes.grounding_span: I'll often give it very specific instructions. Like 'Compare and contrast plant versus animal cells. Make sure to include the following: blah, blah, blah.'
